ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Bond
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Sep-29-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear and show cause as to why the bond has not been filed. The return date is October 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
